field_notes.chunk_x: Primitive chunk coordinate fixture; does not prove chunk data or render state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound set_chunk_cache_center packet framing and dispatch/decode for one primitive chunk x/z fixture only; do not infer chunk loading, world hydration, render readiness, or client-load completion.
